heading: Command: retired officers
label: 750 Command: retired officers
text: A retired officer has no right to command except when on active duty.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , but the authority to prescribe regulations under this section effective on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1980 Amendment note under .Sept. 15, 1981Dec. 12, 1980section 701 of Pub. L. 96–513section 101 of this title
